perks.summary: adversarial: edit a compiled script after the executor snapshots it — the tamper gate (exit 4) must refuse (software-tier SV-1/SV-2)
adversarial: mutate a perk porter after blessing — the per-step snippet check (exit 8) must refuse (software-tier SV-1/SV-2)
adversarial: tamper a Ledger-v2 record — the chain verifier (verify_chain) must refuse (software-tier SV-1/SV-2)
